message:
test(server): add unit tests for auth module token extraction and verification [bd-16v9]

Add 17 new tests for auth.rs covering:
- Access token extraction edge cases: None/array/number/empty params
- Token field variants: token, access_token, accessToken, camelCase
- Nested scheme/token objects with empty scheme fallthrough
- Whitespace-only authorization rejection
- Headers with nested scheme/token objects
- StaticTokenVerifier: unknown token, no scheme restriction
- TokenAuthProvider: valid token success, wrong token failure
- AuthRequest Debug and Copy traits
- AllowAllAuthProvider anonymous context

Server auth: 22 tests (up from 5 in main module).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
